title.en: The MPDU Anatomy: Decoding the General MAC Frame (Clause 7.1)
title.zh: MPDU 剖析：解读通用 MAC 帧（第 7.1 条）

blocks.en: When an 802.15.13 optical wireless device wants to send anything over light — data, a management command, or a control signal — it wraps that information in a single, universal container. IEEE Std 802.15.13-2023 calls this container the MPDU (MAC Protocol Data Unit), and remarkably it defines just one general frame format for every kind of traffic. MAC stands for Medium Access Control, the layer that decides who transmits and packages bits for the air (here, the light). This lesson is a guided tour of that one frame: what every field is, when it appears, and why. Clause 7.1.1 introduces the format; we will walk it field by field.
blocks.zh: 当一台 802.15.13 光无线设备想通过光发送任何内容——数据、管理命令或控制信号时——它都会把这些信息装进一个统一的通用容器中。IEEE Std 802.15.13-2023 把这个容器称为 MPDU（MAC 协议数据单元，MAC Protocol Data Unit），而且它对所有流量只定义了一种通用帧格式。MAC 即介质访问控制（Medium Access Control），是决定谁来发送并把比特打包送上传输介质（此处即光）的那一层。本课将带你逐字段游览这一种帧：每个字段是什么、何时出现、为何存在。第 7.1.1 条引入了该格式；我们将逐字段地讲解它。

blocks.en: Clause 7.1.1 tells us the MPDU has three parts. First, a MAC header carries the fields essential for transmitting and receiving the frame, plus optional fields that appear only when extra information is needed. It always begins with a Frame Control field that announces which subsequent fields are present. Second comes the Payload, the actual content. Third, every frame ends with an FCS (Frame Check Sequence) field — a checksum that detects bit errors. Because so many header fields are conditional, the MPDU is variable-length: it expands and contracts to carry exactly what each transmission requires and nothing more.
blocks.zh: 第 7.1.1 条告诉我们 MPDU 由三部分组成。第一部分是 MAC 头，承载收发该帧所必需的字段，以及仅在需要额外信息时才出现的可选字段。它总是以一个帧控制（Frame Control）字段开头，用来宣告随后哪些字段存在。第二部分是有效载荷（Payload），即真正的内容。第三部分，每一帧都以一个 FCS（帧校验序列，Frame Check Sequence）字段结尾——这是一个用于检测比特错误的校验和。由于许多头字段是有条件出现的，MPDU 是可变长度的：它会伸缩，刚好承载每次传输所需的内容而不多余。

caption.en: The general MAC frame (MPDU) of IEEE Std 802.15.13-2023 (Figure 33). Solid boxes are always present; dashed boxes (Sequence Control, Fragmentation Control, Relay Control) appear only when the Frame Control field signals them.
caption.zh: IEEE Std 802.15.13-2023 的通用 MAC 帧（MPDU，图 33）。实线框始终存在；虚线框（序列控制、分片控制、中继控制）仅在帧控制字段发出相应信号时出现。

blocks.en: The Frame Control field (clause 7.1.2) is the frame's table of contents. It is exactly 2 octets (16 bits) and always sits first, because the receiver must read it before it can know how to parse everything after it. Inside, four small subfields do the steering. Frame Version (bits 0–1) is set to 0b00 to mark a frame compatible with this standard; all other values are reserved. Type (bits 2–3) declares the traffic class: 0b00 = data, 0b01 = control, 0b10 = management, with 0b11 reserved. Fragmented Frame (bit 4) flags that the payload is one piece of a larger split message. Relayed Frame (bit 5) flags that the frame is travelling via a relay device. Bits 6–15 are reserved.
blocks.zh: 帧控制字段（第 7.1.2 条）是帧的目录。它恰好为 2 个八位字节（16 比特），始终位于最前面，因为接收方必须先读它，才能知道如何解析其后的一切。其内部由四个小子字段负责引导。帧版本（Frame Version，第 0–1 位）置为 0b00，表示该帧与本标准兼容；其余取值均保留。类型（Type，第 2–3 位）声明流量类别：0b00 = 数据，0b01 = 控制，0b10 = 管理，0b11 保留。分片帧（Fragmented Frame，第 4 位）标记有效载荷是一条被拆分的较大消息中的一片。中继帧（Relayed Frame，第 5 位）标记该帧正经由中继设备传输。第 6–15 位保留。

blocks.en: Two flags in Frame Control act as switches for optional fields later in the header. Fragmented Frame = 1 turns on the Fragmentation Control field; Relayed Frame = 1 turns on the Relay Control field. This is why the same frame format can be tiny or large — the header literally grows the fields its own flags demand.
blocks.zh: 帧控制中的两个标志位充当头部后续可选字段的开关。分片帧 = 1 会启用分片控制字段；中继帧 = 1 会启用中继控制字段。这正是同一种帧格式能时大时小的原因——头部会按照自己标志位的要求实实在在地增长出相应字段。

blocks.en: Next come the two Address fields (clause 7.1.3), each 6 octets — the same MAC-address width you know from Ethernet and Wi-Fi. The Transmitter Address identifies the device physically putting the frame onto the medium, and the Receiver Address identifies the intended recipient. Right after them sits the Payload Element ID field (clause 7.1.4), 2 octets that name the element carried in the payload. Think of it as a label on the box: the receiver reads the ID to know how to interpret what follows in the Payload. The full catalogue of element IDs lives in Clause 7.2's Table 2.
blocks.zh: 接下来是两个地址字段（第 7.1.3 条），各 6 个八位字节——与你在以太网和 Wi-Fi 中熟悉的 MAC 地址宽度相同。发送方地址（Transmitter Address）标识实际把帧送上传输介质的设备，接收方地址（Receiver Address）标识预期的接收者。紧随其后的是有效载荷元素 ID 字段（第 7.1.4 条），2 个八位字节，用于命名有效载荷中承载的元素。可以把它看作箱子上的标签：接收方读取该 ID，便知道如何解读后面有效载荷中的内容。元素 ID 的完整目录见第 7.2 条的表 2。

blocks.en: The Sequence Control field (clause 7.1.5) is 2 octets and is present only in data and management frames, never in control frames. Its lower 12 bits (bits 0–11) hold a Sequence Number that lets the receiver order frames and detect duplicates. Bit 12 is the ACK Request flag: set to one, it tells the recipient to acknowledge this frame on receipt; set to zero, no acknowledgment is expected. Bits 13–15 are reserved. This single bit is how the MAC chooses between reliable (acknowledged) and best-effort delivery on a frame-by-frame basis.
blocks.zh: 序列控制字段（第 7.1.5 条）为 2 个八位字节，仅出现在数据帧和管理帧中，控制帧中绝不出现。其低 12 位（第 0–11 位）保存一个序列号（Sequence Number），使接收方能够对帧排序并检测重复。第 12 位是 ACK 请求（ACK Request）标志：置 1 时，告知接收方在收到该帧后予以确认；置 0 时，则不期待确认。第 13–15 位保留。正是这一个比特，让 MAC 能够逐帧地在可靠（带确认）传输与尽力而为传输之间做出选择。

blocks.en: The Fragmentation Control field (clause 7.1.6) appears only when the Fragmented Frame flag in Frame Control equals one; otherwise it is absent entirely. Spanning 2 octets, it carries a Fragment Number (bits 0–3) giving this piece's position, and a Last Fragment field (bits 4–7) set to the fragment number of the final piece, so the receiver knows when reassembly is complete. Bits 8–15 are reserved. Fragmentation lets a large payload be split into several MPDUs that fit the available transmission opportunities, then stitched back together at the far end.
blocks.zh: 分片控制字段（第 7.1.6 条）仅在帧控制中的分片帧标志等于 1 时出现；否则完全不存在。它占 2 个八位字节，承载一个分片号（Fragment Number，第 0–3 位）给出本片的位置，以及一个最后分片（Last Fragment，第 4–7 位）字段，置为最后一片的分片号，使接收方知道何时重组完成。第 8–15 位保留。分片机制让较大的有效载荷被拆分为多个适配可用传输机会的 MPDU，再在对端重新拼合起来。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A["Read Frame Control (2 octets)"] --> B{"Fragmented Frame = 1?"}
  B -- yes --> C["Fragmentation Control present"]
  B -- no --> D["skip Fragmentation Control"]
  C --> E{"Relayed Frame = 1?"}
  D --> E
  E -- yes --> F["Relay Control present"]
  E -- no --> G["skip Relay Control"]
  F --> H["Parse Payload by Element ID"]
  G --> H
  H --> I["Verify FCS over all fields"]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A["读取帧控制（2 个八位字节）"] --> B{"分片帧 = 1？"}
  B -- 是 --> C["存在分片控制字段"]
  B -- 否 --> D["跳过分片控制字段"]
  C --> E{"中继帧 = 1？"}
  D --> E
  E -- 是 --> F["存在中继控制字段"]
  E -- 否 --> G["跳过中继控制字段"]
  F --> H["按元素 ID 解析有效载荷"]
  G --> H
  H --> I["对所有字段校验 FCS"]

blocks.en: The Relay Control field (clause 7.1.7) is present only when the Relayed Frame flag equals one. It is 8 octets: a 6-octet Relay Address holding the MAC address of the relay device, plus 2 reserved octets. When a coordinator and a relayed device exchange a data frame through a relay link, the relay device inserts its own MAC address here so the path is identifiable — while the original Transmitter and Receiver Addresses stay unchanged through the hop.
blocks.zh: 中继控制字段（第 7.1.7 条）仅在中继帧标志等于 1 时出现。它为 8 个八位字节：一个 6 八位字节的中继地址（Relay Address），保存中继设备的 MAC 地址，外加 2 个保留八位字节。当协调器与被中继设备通过中继链路交换数据帧时，中继设备会在此处填入自己的 MAC 地址，以便识别路径——而原始的发送方地址与接收方地址在该跳中保持不变。

blocks.en: Finally, the Payload (clause 7.1.8) carries exactly the element named by the Payload Element ID, and only elements permitted for that frame type (per Table 2). One special rule: management frames must carry either a Management Procedure Container element or a Multiple Element Container holding only such containers. Closing every frame is the FCS field (clause 7.1.9): a 32-bit Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC) computed over all MAC-header and frame-body fields, using a degree-32 generator polynomial. The transmitter preloads its CRC register to all ones, divides, and sends the ones-complement remainder highest-order bit first; the receiver repeats the division and a clean transmission yields a fixed nonzero remainder — so any flipped bit shows up as a mismatch.
blocks.zh: 最后，有效载荷（第 7.1.8 条）恰好承载由有效载荷元素 ID 命名的那个元素，且只能是该帧类型所允许的元素（依据表 2）。有一条特殊规则：管理帧必须承载一个管理过程容器（Management Procedure Container）元素，或一个仅包含此类容器的多元素容器（Multiple Element Container）。为每一帧收尾的是 FCS 字段（第 7.1.9 条）：一个 32 比特的循环冗余校验（CRC，Cyclic Redundancy Check），对所有 MAC 头字段与帧体字段计算，使用一个 32 次的生成多项式。发送方将其 CRC 寄存器预置为全 1，做除法，并以最高次项比特优先发送取反后的余数；接收方重复该除法，传输无误时会得到一个固定的非零余数——因此任何翻转的比特都会表现为不匹配。

summary.en: Coverage map — every field of clause 7.1, with exact subclause numbers
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——第 7.1 条的每个字段及其精确子条款编号

blocks.en: Clause 7.1 (General MAC frame format) decomposes into nine units, all taught above. 7.1.1 Overview — defines the MPDU as one universal format with three parts (MAC header, Payload, FCS) and a variable length driven by optional fields (Figure 33). 7.1.2 Frame Control field — the 2-octet steering header: Frame Version (bits 0–1, 0b00), Type (bits 2–3: data/control/management), Fragmented Frame (bit 4), Relayed Frame (bit 5), reserved (bits 6–15) (Figure 34). 7.1.3 Address fields — 6-octet Transmitter Address and Receiver Address. 7.1.4 Payload Element ID field — 2 octets naming the carried element. 7.1.5 Sequence Control field — Sequence Number (bits 0–11) and ACK Request (bit 12); present only in data and management frames (Figure 35). 7.1.6 Fragmentation Control field — Fragment Number (bits 0–3) and Last Fragment (bits 4–7); present only when Fragmented Frame = 1 (Figure 36). 7.1.7 Relay Control field — 6-octet Relay Address plus reserved; present only when Relayed Frame = 1 (Figure 37). 7.1.8 Payload — carries the indicated element(s) allowed for the frame type; management-frame payload rule. 7.1.9 FCS field — 32-bit CRC over all calculation fields using the degree-32 generator polynomial, transmitted highest-order bit first.
blocks.zh: 第 7.1 条（通用 MAC 帧格式）可分解为九个单元，以上均已讲授。7.1.1 概述——将 MPDU 定义为单一通用格式，含三部分（MAC 头、有效载荷、FCS），并由可选字段驱动其可变长度（图 33）。7.1.2 帧控制字段——2 八位字节的引导头：帧版本（第 0–1 位，0b00）、类型（第 2–3 位：数据/控制/管理）、分片帧（第 4 位）、中继帧（第 5 位）、保留（第 6–15 位）（图 34）。7.1.3 地址字段——6 八位字节的发送方地址与接收方地址。7.1.4 有效载荷元素 ID 字段——2 八位字节，命名所承载的元素。7.1.5 序列控制字段——序列号（第 0–11 位）与 ACK 请求（第 12 位）；仅出现在数据帧与管理帧中（图 35）。7.1.6 分片控制字段——分片号（第 0–3 位）与最后分片（第 4–7 位）；仅在分片帧 = 1 时出现（图 36）。7.1.7 中继控制字段——6 八位字节的中继地址加保留位；仅在中继帧 = 1 时出现（图 37）。7.1.8 有效载荷——承载该帧类型所允许的指定元素；含管理帧有效载荷规则。7.1.9 FCS 字段——使用 32 次生成多项式对所有计算字段计算的 32 比特 CRC，以最高次项比特优先发送。

cites.note: Clause 7.1 General MAC frame format, subclauses 7.1.1–7.1.9, including Figures 33–37.
